name: Tullow Oil plc
description: Tullow Oil plc is an independent energy company focused on the exploration and production of oil and gas, with a primary operational emphasis on Africa, particularly in Ghana. The company is committed to building a better future through responsible resource development, aiming to generate long-term value for its stakeholders. Tullow prioritizes operational safety, environmental sustainability, and the implementation of a Net Zero strategy. By leveraging its expertise in deepwater operations and maintaining a resilient business model, the company seeks to unlock value from its existing assets while pursuing organic growth opportunities within the energy sector.
